zh.Of,, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake於大約1212年出生。她於1237年之前與Richard Leake在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Of,, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake于大约1212年出生。她于1237年之前与Richard Leake在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Leake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Leake (Lincolnshire), East and West Leake (Nottinghamshire), Leek (Staffordshire), Leck (Lancashire), Leak (NorthYorkshire), or Leak Hall in Cumberworth (West Yorkshire). The placenames derive from Old English lece or Old Scandinavian lœkr, both meaning ‘brook’. See also Like .
possibly also a nickname from Middle English lek ‘leek’ (Old English lēac), perhaps for a grower or seller of leeks.

variants.name: League
meanings: English (Hereford and Worcester): perhaps a variant of   Leake  .

variants.name: Like
meanings: Probably a variant of   Lyke   1, a surname of Flemish origin.

English: probably a variant of Leake rather than a nickname from Middle English lik ‘similar, alike, equal’, which is not recorded as a personal epithet. This surname is rare in Britain. See also Lyke 2.

variants.name: Leck
meanings: North German: habitational name from a place so named in Schleswig-Holstein.
North German: possibly also an altered form of   Lech  .

variants.name: Leek
meanings: Dutch (also Van der Leek): topographic name for someone living near a water named Leek (North Holland), from leek ‘border water’. Compare Laack 2.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake was born about 1212. She married Richard Leake before 1237, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake est née environ 1212. Elle a épousé Richard Leake avant 1237, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake wurde um 1212 geboren. Sie hat vor 1237 in England Richard Leake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake è nata il circa 1212. Lei sposato Richard Leake prima del 1237, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Of,, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leakeは約1212年に生まれた。1237年以前にイギリスでRichard Leakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake(은)는 대략 1212년 태어났다. 그녀는 1237년 이전 영국에서 Richard Leake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake nasceu aproximadamente 1212. Ela casou-se com Richard Leake antes 1237, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake родилась около 1212 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Leake перед 1237 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Leake nació aproximadamente 1212. Se casó con Richard Leake antes de 1237, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
